name: reporting-engine
description: Clara component for chart capability manifests, dataset profiling, mechanical compatibility evidence, reporting runtime contracts, chart-family adapter resolution, and unified capability rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Expose chart capability contracts, adapter resolution, dataset profiling, and rendering for Clara reports.
interface.longDescription: A Clara-embedded reporting contract component. It packages the reviewed chart-selection manifest, role registry, dataset-profile examples, mechanical compatibility audits, render-proof matrix, family selector playbooks, and Clara adapter registry. It also provides local scripts for reading the reporting contract, resolving capabilities to reporting-engine adapter ids, profiling datasets into chart-useful role candidates, and rendering a chosen capability through the embedded family component. This component is not an orchestrator and does not decide semantic business validity; it surfaces the mechanical evidence needed before a future selector or report workflow chooses and renders charts.
defaultPrompt: Use Reporting Engine to inspect chart capabilities and dataset mechanical compatibility.
Read the packaged chart-selection manifest, profile the dataset into role candidates, and report which chart capabilities are mechanically possible or incomplete.
Do not claim semantic validity or choose a final chart without an explicit semantic layer or user instruction.
